creator: jkh@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This is not a bug.  User has failed to read floppies/README.TXT as directed and 
has also not actually looked at boot.flp to see that it's a 2.88MB floppy image 
which will have a *very* hard time fitting on a 1.44MB floppy, even using the most 
modern mental compression techniques.
